description: Style NoteUrban trendy need not always flout the rules. This clutch from toniq, balances the fine line between completely ethnic and elegance. We recommend debuting this lovely piece with your saris and with your evening dresses!Product DetailsBlack pleated clutch with a magnetic flap closureHas a removable shoulder chainFabric inner with a pocket insideMaterial and Care70% nylon and 30% cottonWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 10 cm x 25 cm
